# Doc API

> Simple HTML to PDF API for developers. Generate PDFs, screenshots, and documents programmatically in seconds.

## What is Doc API?

Doc API is a developer-friendly REST API for generating PDFs and screenshots from HTML. It offers fair pricing, a generous free tier (100 calls/month), and no complex setup.

## Core API Endpoints

- `POST https://api.docapi.co/v1/pdf` — Convert HTML to PDF
- `POST https://api.docapi.co/v1/screenshot` — Capture webpage screenshots

## Authentication

All API requests require an `x-api-key` header with your API key (format: `pk_...`).

## Pricing

- Free: 100 API calls/month
- Starter: $19/month — 1,000 calls/month
- Pro: $49/month — 5,000 calls/month
- Business: $99/month — 20,000 calls/month

## Free Tools (no signup required)

- **Invoice Generator**: https://www.docapi.co/tools/invoice-generator — Create professional PDF invoices
- **OG Image Generator**: https://www.docapi.co/tools/og-image-generator — Generate Open Graph images (1200x630) from any URL
- **Resume Builder**: https://www.docapi.co/tools/resume-builder — Build and download PDF resumes

## Documentation

https://www.docapi.co/docs

## Blog

Guides, tutorials, and comparisons: https://www.docapi.co/blog

Topics covered:
- HTML to PDF conversion
- Screenshot API usage
- Invoice generation
- PDF optimization
- Comparisons with PDFShift, Puppeteer, Bannerbear, ScreenshotOne, and others

## Quick Start Example

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.docapi.co/v1/pdf \
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"html": "<h1>Hello World</h1>"}' \
  --output document.pdf
```

- Homepage: https://www.docapi.co
